case_title: DWIGHT FINANCIAL, INC. VS SALLIN, STEVE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DWIGHT FINANCIAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SALLIN, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DWIGHT FINANCIAL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALLIN, STEVE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, JUDGMENT STIPULATED BY PARTIES. DEFENDANT TO KEEP MOTORCYCLE. $2500 IN CASH PAID BY DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF IN OPEN COURT TODAY. PLAINTIFF TO DELIVER PINK SLIP FOR MOTORCYCLE TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SALLIN, STEVE
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-03-2003 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SALLIN, STEVE
